requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F (DSTU IEC 62368-1, UkrSEPRO)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——230V / 50Hz / C/F型插头（DSTU IEC 62368-1，UkrSEPRO）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——230V / 50Hz / C/F型插頭（DSTU IEC 62368-1，UkrSEPRO）

summary.en: Ukraine operates on a 230 V / 50 Hz power supply with Type C and Type F (Schuko-compatible) plug standards, consistent with the European continental standard. Electrical safety for audio/video, information technology, and communications equipment is assessed against DSTU IEC 62368-1 (the Ukrainian adoption of IEC 62368-1:2018, aligned with EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11). Products must be assessed under the UkrSEPRO national conformity assessment system and bear the UR mark. CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1) is not recognised. Chinese domestic products rated 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A plug are physically incompatible with Ukrainian Type C/F sockets — hardware redesign including plug type and voltage/frequency marking is required.
summary.zh: 乌克兰采用230V/50Hz供电，使用C型和F型（兼容Schuko）插头标准，与欧洲大陆标准一致。音频/视频、信息技术和通信设备的电气安全评估依据DSTU IEC 62368-1（乌克兰对IEC 62368-1:2018的采用版本，与EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11保持一致）。产品须在UkrSEPRO国家符合性评估体系下完成评估并加贴UR标志。CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1）不被认可。中国国内220V/50Hz A型插头产品与乌克兰C/F型插座物理不兼容——须对插头类型及电压/频率标注进行硬件改造。
summary.zht: 烏克蘭採用230V/50Hz供電，使用C型和F型（兼容Schuko）插頭標準，與歐洲大陸標準一致。音頻/視頻、信息技術和通訊設備的電氣安全評估依據DSTU IEC 62368-1（烏克蘭對IEC 62368-1:2018的採用版本，與EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11保持一致）。產品須在UkrSEPRO國家符合性評估體系下完成評估並加貼UR標誌。CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1）不被認可。中國國內220V/50Hz A型插頭產品與烏克蘭C/F型插座物理不兼容——須對插頭類型及電壓/頻率標注進行硬體改造。

standards_or_laws: DSTU IEC 62368-1:2019 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (aligned with IEC 62368-1:2018 / EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11)
UkrSEPRO national conformity assessment system — UR mark
Ukraine power standard: 230 V / 50 Hz, Type C / Type F (Schuko) plugs
Law of Ukraine on Conformity Assessment No. 2406-III (as amended)
DSSU (State Standard of Ukraine) — DSTU standards catalogue

summary.en: China applies GB 4943.1-2022 (Safety of audio/video, information technology, and communications technology equipment) under the mandatory CCC scheme for in-scope products. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A (and Type I) plugs. CCC electrical safety certification does not carry recognition in Ukraine; DSTU IEC 62368-1 assessment under UkrSEPRO is required separately.
summary.zh: 中国通过CCC强制认证方案对目录内产品适用GB 4943.1-2022（音频/视频、信息技术和通信技术设备安全要求）。中国采用220V/50Hz供电，使用A型（及I型）插头。CCC电气安全认证在乌克兰不获承认；须另行完成UkrSEPRO下的DSTU IEC 62368-1评估。
summary.zht: 中國通過CCC強制認證方案對目錄內產品適用GB 4943.1-2022（音頻/視頻、信息技術和通訊技術設備安全要求）。中國採用220V/50Hz供電，使用A型（及I型）插頭。CCC電氣安全認證在烏克蘭不獲承認；須另行完成UkrSEPRO下的DSTU IEC 62368-1評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Safety of audio/video, information technology and communications technology equipment
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA) — electrical safety catalogue
China power standard: 220 V / 50 Hz, Type A plug (GB 2099.1)

gap.en: CCC (GB 4943.1) electrical safety certification is not recognised in Ukraine. A new DSTU IEC 62368-1 assessment under UkrSEPRO is required. If the product already holds EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 CE test reports, these are generally accepted by NKRZI as technical evidence (EU Association Agreement alignment), reducing re-testing costs. Products designed for China's 220 V / Type A configuration require hardware adaptation (Type C/F plug, 230 V compatibility verification, updated labelling) for Ukraine. Conflict-related disruption may delay UkrSEPRO assessment processing times.
gap.zh: CCC（GB 4943.1）电气安全认证在乌克兰不被认可。须进行新的UkrSEPRO下的DSTU IEC 62368-1评估。若产品已持有EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11的CE测试报告，这些报告通常被NKRZI作为技术证明接受（欧盟联系协定对齐），可降低重新测试成本。针对中国220V/A型插头配置设计的产品需进行硬件改造（C/F型插头、230V兼容性验证、标注更新）。当前局势相关干扰可能延迟UkrSEPRO评估处理时间。
gap.zht: CCC（GB 4943.1）電氣安全認證在烏克蘭不被認可。須進行新的UkrSEPRO下的DSTU IEC 62368-1評估。若產品已持有EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11的CE測試報告，這些報告通常被NKRZI作為技術證明接受（歐盟聯繫協定對齊），可降低重新測試成本。針對中國220V/A型插頭配置設計的產品需進行硬體改造（C/F型插頭、230V兼容性驗證、標注更新）。當前局勢相關干擾可能延遲UkrSEPRO評估處理時間。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DSTU IEC 62368-1 electrical safety assessment and UkrSEPRO UR mark are mandatory for mains-powered wireless devices sold in Ukraine. CCC is not recognised. EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 CE test reports may be reused as technical evidence under the EU Association Agreement pathway. Hardware adaptation from Type A / 220 V to Type C/F / 230 V is required for China-market configurations. Assess processing timelines with a qualified Ukrainian representative given conflict-related disruption to government services.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DSTU IEC 62368-1电气安全评估和UkrSEPRO UR标志是乌克兰市销市电供电无线设备的强制要求。CCC认证不被认可。EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11的CE测试报告可通过欧盟联系协定路径作为技术证明复用。中国市场A型/220V配置须进行C/F型/230V的硬件改造。鉴于局势对政府服务的干扰，请与合格乌克兰代表评估处理时间。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DSTU IEC 62368-1電氣安全評估和UkrSEPRO UR標誌是烏克蘭市銷市電供電無線設備的強制要求。CCC認證不被認可。EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11的CE測試報告可通過歐盟聯繫協定路徑作為技術證明複用。中國市場A型/220V配置須進行C/F型/230V的硬體改造。鑒於局勢對政府服務的干擾，請與合格烏克蘭代表評估處理時間。
